task_completion.description: Verify the location is set to Paranal Observatory using the provided coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium location window (F6) or bottom status bar shows 'Paranal Observatory' or coordinates matching Latitude -24.6272, Longitude -70.4042.

task_completion.description: Verify the observation date and time are set to July 16, 2023, at 01:00 UTC.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium date/time window (F5) or bottom status bar clearly displays '2023-07-16' and '01:00:00'.

task_completion.description: Verify the simulation shows pure sky conditions with the equatorial grid enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Stellarium sky background is completely black (no blue atmospheric scattering), no ground/landscape is visible, and curved equatorial grid lines are displayed. The corresponding icons in the bottom toolbar (Atmosphere, Ground) should be toggled off, and Equatorial Grid toggled on.

task_completion.description: Verify screenshots of the three deep-sky targets were captured and saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Stellarium showing the targets (NGC 3372, NGC 5128, NGC 5139) centered with screenshot capture notifications, OR a file manager open to '/home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/' showing at least 3 saved image files.

task_completion.description: Verify the session notes file was created with the required documentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/session_notes.txt' (visible in the title bar or save dialog) containing the target names (NGC 3372, NGC 5128, NGC 5139) and the observation date (2023-07-16).

integrity.description: Check that the agent interacted with the Stellarium GUI to configure the session and take screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Stellarium application is open and actively used (search window, location window, toolbars visible), rather than the agent just running terminal commands or downloading images.

integrity.description: Check that the session notes were actually saved to the correct path on the Desktop.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor title bar shows the exact path '/home/ga/Desktop/session_notes.txt' or the file icon is visibly created on the Desktop environment.

integrity.description: Check that the agent didn't use a web browser to find images or information instead of using the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browser is open searching for 'NGC 3372', 'NGC 5128', 'NGC 5139' images or Paranal Observatory coordinates.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Location: Paranal Observatory (Lat: -24.6272, Lon: -70.4042, Alt: 2635m). Date/Time: 2023-07-16 01:00:00 UTC. Targets: NGC 3372 (Eta Carinae Nebula), NGC 5128 (Centaurus A), NGC 5139 (Omega Centauri). Display requirements: Atmosphere OFF, Landscape/Ground OFF, Equatorial Grid ON. Outputs: Screenshots must be in /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/, and notes must be in /home/ga/Desktop/session_notes.txt containing the target names and the date 2023-07-16.
